purpose: Define source-safe preview validation for CRM entities linked to external folder references without opening providers, reading documents, writing providers, storing raw private links or processing document contents.
folderRefRules: External folder references are opaque references in Phase A preview, not provider URLs to open.
Do not store signed URLs, share URLs with tokens, raw document URLs, provider secrets, OAuth tokens, folder contents or attachment contents.
External provider access is future only and requires explicit provider configuration and access policy.
Folder references must be linked to a stable CRM entity and must not be inferred by visual name matching.
Finance or shopper-private documents must use restricted visibility and manual review until gates are approved.
Client read-only summaries must not expose internal audit or private shopper documents.
One externalFolderRefId may link to one primary crmEntityId unless an explicit relatedEntityRef is provided.
crmRules: CRM entities must be tenant/project scoped.
CRM pipeline/stage is metadata only in this preview.
Creating or linking a CRM entity does not create an external folder or write a provider.
External document references do not prove document existence until a provider integration is authorized.
Any ambiguous entity-to-folder mapping returns manual_review_required.
claudePrototypeImpact: CRM/document UI must not say folder created, synced or connected while provider gates are off.
Show states: folder ref preview, provider pending, permission review, blocked private link, manual review.
Do not expose raw private URLs, signed links, document contents or attachments.
Link folders to stable CRM entities, not visual names only.
Academia must explain external folder refs, permissions and provider pending states by role.

newLessons: Why a folder reference is not a provider connection
How to link a folder ref to a CRM entity
Why raw private links are blocked
How client summaries differ from internal docs
interactiveChecklists: Before exposing a document reference to a role
Before sharing a client read-only summary

hardStops: Do not read external providers from this preview.
Do not write external providers from this preview.
Do not connect OAuth from this preview.
Do not store signed URLs, provider tokens or secrets.
Do not process raw document contents or attachments.
Do not mark folder created or synced while gates are off.
Do not infer folder matching by visual names only.
